title: Everything You Need
subtitle: Connect with real people, authentic moments, and safety across Tanzania.

features.title: Live Tanzania Experience Feed
features.desc: Discover real moments from local life, cultural experiences, and safety tips. Scroll through authentic Tanzania stories.

features.title: Your Tanzania Companion AI
features.desc: Your local guide, safety advisor, and cultural explainer — available 24/7 in Swahili or English. Ask anything, anytime.

features.title: Safety Network
features.desc: One-tap emergency response connects you to nearby guides and responders instantly. Stay safe anywhere in Tanzania.

features.title: Live Experience Map of Tanzania
features.desc: Explore safety tips, authentic experiences, and hidden gems across Tanzania on an interactive map with real-time updates.

features.title: Secure Booking System
features.desc: Book verified local guides with protected payments. Safe and secure until your experience is complete.

features.title: Kilicare Play
features.desc: Football insights, predictions, and fun engagement. Entertainment layer for sports fans — for enjoyment and insights only.

features.title: Experience Passport
features.desc: Earn points, unlock badges, and level up. Track your Tanzania journey and compete on the leaderboard.

features.title: Tanzania Culture & Experience Gallery
features.desc: Discover local creators, cultural stories, and authentic experiences. A digital exhibition of Tanzania's rich heritage.
